steps.title: Read the boundary line
steps.content: From the graph the boundary has slope $4$ and y-intercept $3$, so the line is $y=4x+3$.

steps.title: Determine the inequality direction
steps.content:
The shaded region lies above the boundary (and the line is dashed, so the inequality is strict), giving $y>4x+3$.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
